message:
feat: Replace emoji icons with SVG icons for better accessibility

Replace emoji characters with proper SVG icon components in the 3D viewer
and simulation panels for improved accessibility and visual consistency.

Model3DView.tsx:
- Added icon imports for IconCamera, IconCube, IconDna, IconFlask, IconRepeat
- Replaced emoji icons with SVG icons:
  - 🧊 → IconCube (WebGL unavailable message)
  - ⟳ → IconRepeat (Reset view button)
  - 📷 → IconCamera (Screenshot button)
  - 🔬 → IconFlask (Functional groups toggle)
  - 🧬 → IconDna (No structure available message)
- Added aria-label attributes to buttons for screen reader support
- Added aria-hidden="true" to decorative icons

SimulationView.tsx:
- Removed emoji icon prop from Overlay component (uses header icon system)

icons.tsx:
- Added new IconCamera component (camera/screenshot icon)

Benefits:
- Better screen reader compatibility with aria-labels
- Consistent icon styling across themes
- No emoji rendering inconsistencies across platforms
- Smaller bundle size (SVG vs emoji font fallbacks)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
